channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Geopolitical news aggregator covering global events

item.title: 🇨🇳🇹🇼 China Rejects Taiwan Sovereignty Claims After Leader Pledges Never to Be Sacrificed
item.description: Beijing stated Taiwan was "never a country" after Taiwanese leader William Lai Ching-te said the island would never be traded away, in the latest exchange over cross-strait sovereignty.

item.title: 🇩🇪🇹🇷🇪🇺 Germany Calls for Stronger EU-Turkey Ties, Says Ankara Key to NATO Defense
item.description: German Foreign Minister Johann Wadephul said Turkey should be included as the EU develops its defense policy, citing shared security interests and Turkiye role as a critical NATO ally.

item.title: 🇮🇱🏛️ Israel Opposition Demands Knesset Dissolution, Early Elections Amid Coalition Strains
item.description: Israeli opposition leaders urged lawmakers to support a bill for preliminary vote next week to dissolve parliament, as the governing coalition faces mounting internal political pressure.

item.title: ⚔️☢️ France 24 Reports Belarus Nuclear Drills Include Oreshnik Hypersonic Missiles
item.description: Russia and Belarus began joint exercises practicing delivery of nuclear munitions using Oreshnik hypersonic missiles deployed to Belarus last year, Ukraine condemned the drills as an "unprecedented challenge" to global security.

item.title: ⚔️☢️ SCMP Covers Belarus Nuclear Exercises Near NATO Borders
item.description: Belarus began training exercises involving Russian tactical nuclear weapons, testing military readiness to deploy nuclear arms across different regions of the country bordering three NATO states.

item.title: 🇵🇰 Pakistan Deploys Fighter Jets and Troops to Saudi Arabia Amid Iran War
item.description: Pakistan is ramping up military cooperation with Riyadh, deploying a jet squadron and thousands of troops, even as Islamabad serves as the main mediator in the Iran-US conflict.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Pakistan Conveys New Iranian Peace Proposal to United States
item.description: Iran sent a revised peace proposal to the US via Pakistani mediators with terms similar to previously rejected offers, though a senior Iranian official claims Washington has softened on some issues.

item.title: ⚠️ Belarus and Russia Conduct Joint Nuclear Weapons Drills
item.description: Belarus launched military exercises practicing the use of Russian tactical nuclear weapons deployed on its territory, drawing strong condemnation from Ukraine.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇳 China Commits to $17 Billion in Annual US Agricultural Purchases
item.description: Following the Trump-Xi summit in Beijing, China agreed to buy at least $17 billion annually in US farm products for three years, marking a significant trade commitment amid broader diplomatic engagement.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russia Strikes Odesa and Dnipro in Overnight Attacks
item.description: Russian forces targeted Ukrainian cities of Odesa and Dnipro with missiles and drones, damaging residential buildings and injuring dozens, while Ukrainian drone strikes killed two in Russia.

item.title: 🇷🇺🇨🇳 Kremlin Has High Expectations for Putin's China Visit
item.description: Russia expressed serious expectations for President Putin's upcoming trip to China this week, where he will meet Xi Jinping to discuss developing their "privileged partnership" amid the Iran war and Ukraine conflict.

item.title: 🇺🇦🇭🇺 Ukraine and Hungary to Hold Minority Rights Consultations
item.description: Kyiv and Budapest agreed to talks about Ukraine's ethnic Hungarian minority rights this week, seeking to rebuild ties following Hungary's government change.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Putin Faces Difficult Choices as Sanctions Bite, Estonia Spy Chief Says
item.description: Estonia's foreign intelligence chief said Russia has few good options in Ukraine as Western sanctions chip away at its resources while its forces cannot advance significantly on the battlefield.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Israel-Hezbollah fighting continues despite truce extension
item.description: Israel carried out airstrikes in southern Lebanon while Hezbollah announced new attacks on Israeli forces, continuing the conflict despite a U.S.-backed truce extension. Lebanon death toll nears 3,000.

item.title: 💰 Dollar retreats as oil falls on report of US-Iran sanctions waiver
item.description: The dollar slipped against major currencies as oil prices fell after an Iranian news report indicated the US may waive sanctions on Iranian crude. 10-year Treasury yields withdrew from 15-month highs.

item.title: 🇭🇷 Croatia Rejects Proposed Israeli Ambassador Over Government Policies
item.description: Croatian President Milanović says the nominee will not receive approval, citing actions of the current Israeli government and a diplomatic protocol dispute.

item.title: 🇩🇪 Merkel Criticizes EU for Not Talking to Russia on Ukraine
item.description: Former German Chancellor Angela Merkel said the EU should maintain dialogue with Russia, though she declined to lead such talks herself, in a rare political intervention.

item.title: 🇸🇾 Syria Joins G7 Finance Sessions in Paris in Sign of Legitimization
item.description: Syria will participate in closed-door G7 finance minister meetings in Paris, a sign of its growing international status less than two years after the fall of Assad.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Establishes New Body to Manage Strait of Hormuz Amid Stalled Talks
item.description: Iran formed the Persian Gulf Strait Authority (PGSA) to manage the vital shipping route as peace negotiations with the US remained deadlocked.

item.title: 🇬🇱 Greenland PM Tells US Envoy: Self-Determination Cannot Be Negotiated
item.description: Greenland Prime Minister Jens-Frederik Nielsen met with US special envoy Jeff Landry and reaffirmed that Greenland self-determination is not for negotiation.

item.title: ⚔️ Senior Islamic State Leader Killed in US-Nigeria Joint Operation
item.description: Abu-Bilal al-Minuki, a senior Islamic State leader and head of the General Directorate of States, was killed along with several lieutenants in a strike on his compound in Lake Chad Basin. He was linked to the 2018 Dapchi schoolgirls kidnapping.

item.title: 🌍 USAID Cuts Linked to Surge in Violence Across Africa, Study Finds
item.description: A study published in Science journal found that the abrupt dissolution of USAID last year was followed by a significant increase in violence in African countries that had historically received the most support from the agency.

item.title: 🇨🇳🚢 Russian Drone Strikes Chinese-Linked Cargo Ship Near Odesa
item.description: A Russian Shahed drone hit a Chinese-owned bulk carrier in the Black Sea near Odesa, injuring no one but damaging two civilian vessels. The incident comes just before Putin's visit to Beijing to deepen ties with China.

item.title: 🇺🇦⚔️ Ukrainian Troops Nearly Cut Off in Northern Pokrovsk
item.description: Ukrainian forces in northern Pokrovsk are "almost cut off" as Russian drones dominate logistics routes, making resupply, evacuations, and troop rotations nearly impossible, according to Ukraine's 7th Rapid Response Corps.

item.title: 🇺🇦💰 Zelensky's Former Chief of Staff Released on $3 Million Bail
item.description: Andriy Yermak, former head of Ukraine's presidential office, was released on $3.1 million bail amid a major corruption probe involving money laundering tied to the construction of a luxury cottage complex near Kyiv.
